name: Rainbow Trout Provencale
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Dry vermouth or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and the next four ingredients in a microwavable dish. Cover and microwave on full power for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in vermouth, tomato paste, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Place trout fillets flesh-side down on the vegetable mixture; cover and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Rotate the dish and cook for 1 to 2 minutes longer, or until fish flakes with a fork.
5. Place trout on serving plate and top with vegetable mixture. Garnish with additional parsley.
6. Makes 2 to 4 servings. About 255 calories per 4-oz serving.
